content: Currently you cant preview the song without third party sources outside the game without spending a reality verge, as it is a valuable resource it would be nice if we could preview a song before spending a reality verge on it.
thread_title: Allow preview of songs in Archive Phonograph before spending Reality Verge.

content:
關於追隨者可以選取為關注或互相關注來看
但是關注不行，這樣導致要刪未關注的人還要慢慢的找
所以希望新增跟追隨者一樣的功能

The description of the Relic "Foreign Stamp Album" states it should trigger whenever a "Non-Awakener Card" is played, but the actual effect is able to trigger when Corposant's Buff Card "Pilot" is played.

Either this is a bug (and it should not trigger), or the definition "Awakener Card" should not be used.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」"Foreign Stamp Album" effect does not match description

content:
The Gmurphy Divine Aequor realm changing idea is a very nice touch to the game. Please, make more characters like that in the future, for other realms too.

I also suggest:
- some synergy boost effects bonus between Wheels of Destiny. (on same character, or in the whole team)
- some synergy boost effects bonus between Covenants (or the ability to add 2 covenants on one Character, with some nerf effects maybe)
- do nerf only when really needed. Imo, **nerf is bad**, **buff is better**. You only have to **nerf characters by buffing enemies/game difficulty**
- other gameplay boost mechanics, like maybe familiars entities granting bonuses triggering on some conditions in battle or shops. Or Abilities to fuse 2 relics/covenants/Poses into one, other... (when money and business roadmap allows it)

Thank you : )

I love these little communications between the characters and Leonora. As insignificant in the grand scheme of things most of those conversations can be, they add so much depth to the characters, makes them feel so much more alive and real. After all, lives don't consist solely of big adventures, right?

Thanks so much for this feature, it is absolutely awesome.

Currently the In-Sheath supply daily item expire in 24 hours, making it impossible to stack up the resources for another event more desirable.

I believe it is going to be much more desirable to make it expire only after 7-14 days (or even longer) since it's already much worse than having the "Special Potion Supply" item.

Thank you!
thread_title: In-Sheath Supply pack possibility of stacking
